hooks.command: jq -n '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:"OpenRig CLAUDE.md ordena que estas skills sejam carregadas sempre que houver código Rust ou Slint envolvido. Invoque-as via Skill tool no início da sessão, em uma única mensagem com chamadas paralelas: openrig-code-quality, rust-best-practices, slint-best-practices. As skills situacionais (superpowers:brainstorming, test-driven-development, systematic-debugging, executing-plans, verification-before-completion, receiving-code-review, finishing-a-development-branch, writing-skills, dispatching-parallel-agents) permanecem sob demanda quando a situação correspondente surgir, conforme CLAUDE.md."}}'

[ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true

branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if echo "$branch" | grep -qE '^(feature|bugfix)/issue-[0-9]+$'; then N=$(echo "$branch" | sed -E 's|^(feature\|bugfix)/issue-||'); jq -n --arg n "$N" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:("You just pushed to issue branch #"+$n+". Per CLAUDE.md issue traceability rules, you MUST run `gh issue comment "+$n+"` now with: (a) commit hashes pushed, (b) files changed, (c) any decisions, conflicts, or findings since the last comment. Do not respond with new content until that comment is posted.")}}'; fi
